action.reasoning: Observation: predict crashes at preprocess(batch) with "ObservationProcessorStep requires an observation in the transition."; RecordingEvaluator incomplete (missing full evaluate override, main(), proper init from base Evaluator with tasks/episode_config from eval_config.json); test_obs shows correct runtime obs (4x480x480x3 rgb, ee_state=8D) but no end-to-end success (all 0.0). Pretrained PI0+processor loads OK. Analysis: Batch to preprocess must match expected Transition/dict nesting for language->tokens conversion and image/state handling (complementary_data['task'] per guidance but format mismatch triggers step error); evaluator must exactly replicate base evaluate_single_episode calls per contract to inherit attrs and produce required per-episode JSON list. Action bridge (delta pos*0.05, euler*0.5, grip clip) and view mapping (select 3/4 cams to PI0 names, PIL->224) are close but untested due to crash. No training yet as adapter must validate first. Decision: Write test_preprocess.py to load preprocess, try 5 batch formats (current complementary, top-level task, language key, Transition if available, observation-only) to identify working input that produces language.tokens without error; update predict.py to full working version (complete RecordingEvaluator replicating base logic + evaluate_single_episode, add main() parsing eval_config.json and saving exact JSON episodes, use best batch format from diagnostic, add debug prints/try-except, cpu fallback, improved image conversion to tensor if needed); run test_preprocess.py then test_obs.py for local validation before eval submission. This isolates root cause and gets end-to-end predict running for potential non-zero success_rate.
